message:
perf(bench): add profiling profile and suggest benchmarks

- Add [profile.profiling] build profile for flamegraph/perf analysis
- Add comprehensive Thompson sampling bandit benchmarks to search_perf.rs:
  - select_weights with empty and full context
  - estimated_weights (deterministic path)
  - update operation
  - trained bandit with varying observation counts
- Add lru crate dependency for caching support

Addresses meta_skill-red Performance Optimization requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -102,6 +102,7 @@ rand = "0.9.2"
 rand_distr = "0.5.1"
 which = "8.0.0"
 humantime-serde = "1.1.1"
+lru = "0.14"
 
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen-gix = { version = "1.0.9", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
@@ -133,6 +134,14 @@ strip = true
 [profile.dev]
 opt-level = 1
 
+# Profiling profile: release optimizations with debug symbols for flamegraph/perf
+# Usage: cargo build --profile=profiling
+# Then: cargo flamegraph --profile=profiling --bin ms -- search "query"
+[profile.profiling]
+inherits = "release"
+debug = true
+strip = false
+
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "forbid"
